stepTexts.0: Today you learn to hold back. From now on, I'll forbid you from swallowing. Your spit, you keep it in your mouth until I allow it.
stepTexts.14: If you crack and swallow without permission, that's a fault. You press the big red button — I want to know about it. Understood?
stepTexts.26: We start. From now on: no more swallowing. Keep it all in your mouth.
stepTexts.40: Keep going. Let it run if it overflows, but don't swallow.
stepTexts.54: Mouth wide open. Hold it on the tip. Keep it all.
stepTexts.60: Start over, slow. Drool on it. Still nothing in the throat.
stepTexts.74: Now — swallow. All at once. Empty your mouth.
stepTexts.78: Good. You know how to hold back. From now on, when I tell you, you'll keep it all in your mouth.
